basic_details.job_title: DRDO DLRL Internship Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 75 Posts
basic_details.department: Defence Electronics Research Laboratory, DRDO, Ministry of Defence
basic_details.short_information: Defence Electronics Research Laboratory (DLRL), DRDO has published the Paid Internship Notification 2026 on 16 April 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 75 Paid Internship positions in Electronics and Communication Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, and Mechanical Engineering. Candidates within the final year of B.E./B.Tech (2026-2027) and holding a relevant engineering degree are eligible to apply offline through drdo.gov.in. The application process will be active from 16-04-2026 to 15-05-2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and application link below.

qualification.education_qualification: Students going to final year B.E./B.Tech. in 2026-2027 in the respective discipline (no backlogs allowed)
qualification.details: Educational Qualification (Mandatory): Students who are going to the final year B.E./B.Tech. in the academic year 2026-2027 in the respective discipline (Electronics & Communication Engineering / Computer Science Engineering / Mechanical Engineering). Students with backlogs are not eligible. | Other Conditions: Candidates must submit referral/sponsorship letter from their respective college along with the application. Selected candidates will be required to submit Police Verification Certificate and No Objection Certificate (NOC) from the Principal at the time of joining.

salary_details.pay_scale: ₹30,000/- (total) in two installments of ₹15,000/- each (subject to minimum 15 days attendance per month)
salary_details.payment schedule: ₹15,000/- after completion of 3 months + ₹15,000/- after completion of 6 months (subject to minimum 15 days attendance per month)
salary_details.other benefits: No other expenditure (lodging, boarding, transport, medical etc.) will be provided by DLRL; to be borne by the intern
salary_details.details: Selected interns will receive a total stipend of ₹30,000/- for the 6-month internship.

selection_process: The selection for DLRL Paid Internship 2026 will be based on the following:
Merit List: Selection will be based on merit i.e. cumulative marks percentage / CGPA obtained up to 3rd year 1st Semester & interview / interaction
Tie-Breaker: If two candidates obtain the same percentage of marks
Date of Birth will be considered and the candidate elder in age will be given preference.

Final Intimation: Selected students will only be notified about the joining procedures through the mail ID mentioned in the application form. No communication will be undertaken with unselected students.
how_to_apply: Eligible students for DLRL Paid Internship 2026 must submit their application offline by post. The application process is as follows:
Step 1 - Download Form: Download the prescribed application form from the official DRDO website https://drdo.gov.in/drdo/en/offerings/vacancies.
Step 2 - Fill Application: Fill the application form in capital letters. Attach the referral/sponsorship letter from the respective college (on college letterhead) and all required documents.

Step 3 - Send Application: Send the duly filled application along with enclosures to the following address by post, mentioning on the envelope “Application for Paid Internship with Discipline” for which the candidate is applying:
The Director, Defence Electronics Research Laboratory, Government of India, Ministry of Defence, Defence Research & Development Organization, Chandrayangutta Lines, Hyderabad - 500 005

Note: Last date for receipt of applications at DLRL is 15 May 2026. Incomplete, erroneous, illegible and applications received after the due date will not be considered. Canvassing in any form will be a disqualification.
important_instructions: Students with backlogs are not eligible. The duration of paid internship is for six months starting from 1st July 2026 tentatively. Students who do not complete the 6 months internship will not be awarded the internship certificate. Completion of the internship does not guarantee employment in DRDO. Other expenditure such as lodging, boarding, transport, medical etc., if any, will be borne by the individual concerned. Selected candidates will be intimated through mail along with terms & conditions and guidelines of internship. After selection, the candidate is required to obtain police verification certificate and submit at the time of joining. The number of vacancies is tentative. The decision of the Internship Selection Committee shall be final. All information related to the selection will be published on the DRDO website only; candidates must regularly check the website.

faq.question: Q1. How many seats are available in DRDO DLRL Paid Internship 2026?
faq.answer: Defence Electronics Research Laboratory (DLRL), DRDO has announced 75 paid internship positions - 40 in Electronics & Communication Engineering, 25 in Computer Science Engineering and 10 in Mechanical Engineering under Advt. No. DLRL/HRD/PINT/2026/01.

faq.question: Q2. Who is eligible to apply for DLRL Hyderabad Paid Internship 2026?
faq.answer: Only students who will be in their final year B.E./B.Tech in the academic year 2026‑2027 in ECE, CSE or Mechanical Engineering are eligible; applicants must not have any backlogs and must be bonafide students of a recognised engineering college.

faq.question: Q3. What is the duration and start date of the DRDO DLRL internship 2026?
faq.answer: The internship is for 6 months, tentatively starting from 01 July 2026, and runs full‑time at DLRL, Chandrayangutta Lines, Hyderabad.

faq.question: Q4. What stipend is offered in DRDO DLRL Paid Internship 2026?
faq.answer: Selected interns will receive a total stipend of ₹30,000 for 6 months, paid in two instalments of ₹15,000 each – after completion of 3 months and again after 6 months, subject to a minimum of 15 days attendance per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode and last date for DRDO DLRL internship 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline by post only. The last date for receipt of applications at DLRL, Hyderabad is 15 May 2026; applications received after this date will not be considered.

faq.question: Q6. Which documents are required to apply for DLRL Hyderabad Paid Internship 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must send a duly filled application form along with Aadhaar card, College ID, Bonafide certificate, marksheets up to 3rd year 1st semester and a referral/sponsorship letter from their college (on official letterhead); incomplete applications or those without the referral letter will be rejected.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for DRDO DLRL Paid Internship 2026?
faq.answer: Selection is based on merit, primarily the cumulative percentage/CGPA up to 3rd year 1st semester, and interview/interaction if required; in case of a tie in marks, date of birth is used as a tie‑breaker, with preference given to the older candidate.

faq.question: Q8. How do I send my application for the DLRL internship and what should be written on the envelope?
faq.answer: The Director, Defence Electronics Research Laboratory (DLRL), DRDO, Chandrayangutta Lines, Hyderabad - 500 005, with the envelope clearly superscribed “Application for Paid Internship with Discipline (ECE/CSE/ME)”.

faq.question: Q9. Are accommodation, transport or other allowances provided during the DLRL internship?
faq.answer: No, DLRL only pays the stipend of ₹30,000; all other expenses such as lodging, boarding, transport and medical are to be borne by the intern.

faq.question: Q10. Does completion of DRDO DLRL Paid Internship 2026 guarantee a job in DRDO?
faq.answer: No, completion of the internship does not guarantee employment in DRDO. Interns will receive an internship certificate only on successful completion of the full 6‑month duration; leaving early may result in no certificate.
